name: Applesauce Oat Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: Ground cinnamon or pumpkin pie spice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, oat bran, brown sugar, baking powder, and ground cinnamon or pumpkin pie spice.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the applesauce, water, oil, and egg whites. Beat with a fork until well blended.
3. Add the applesauce mixture to the dry ingredients and stir with a spoon until all flour is moistened.
4. Grease muffin tins with margarine or line them with paper liners.
5. Fill each muffin cup about 1/2 full.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes, or until the muffins are golden brown and spring back when touched in the center.
7. Serve hot if possible.
Nutrient value per 1 muffin serving: CAL 120; CHO 18 gm; PRO 3 gm; FAT 5 gm; NA 120 mg
Food exchanges per serving: 1 bread, 1 fat
